name: Vulhub-Flask-SSTI
isolation_note: Vulhub flask/ssti container, bound to 127.0.0.1:8110 only (no external route). Owned, disposable, local lab — restart the container to reset. Confirm the bind is 127.0.0.1 before authorizing.
rationale: Flask/Jinja2 Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI). `?name={{7*7}}` renders 49, confirming injection; `config`/`request` are absent from the template context but `self` is, so RCE goes via self.__init__.__globals__.__builtins__.__import__('os').popen(...).read() (empirically returns uid=33(www-data); reads /etc/passwd). Adds the SSTI vuln class (web template-injection -> command execution -> file read). Needs only curl; the eta_recipes carry the box-specific SSTI payload the generic templates cannot express.
